gpu: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1070 with Max-Q Design
notes:
This is by far the most unstable game i had ever had the pleasure to install. You have more luck to hold a single bar of uranium in a folded piece of paper in a storm in a middle of Kansas than to play this game. I had tried multiple OSes (Fedora(currently), Arch based, Linux Mint and Zorin OS), and all ended the same way. This game was simply and all, unstable for anything that isnt Windows 11. Try to connect your account? Crash. Try to start? Crash. Contact customer support for some reason given to our beloved Lord Jesus Christ? Crash. And its not only been recently but since atleast november of 2025, before that i cant say, since its only then i jumped on the Linux train and i havent installed it on my Steam Deck.

TLDR, shits broken, Hao Play like most eastern devs dont really care about linux, play it on your phone or donate your data to Microsoft.
